div1.entryFree: Comparative, adj., 1) quick at comparisons: the most c. young prince, H4A I, 2, 90. -- 2) serving as a comparison, to express the respective value of things: thou wert dignified enough, if it were made c. for your virtues, to be styled the under-hangman of his kingdom, Cymb. II, 3, 134.
